title: Slloths casino!
description: an optional lore and rp create mod origins based smp for vtubers and pngtubers who need people to collab with or make friends! this project has many mods mostly for optimization- big thanks to ttv/corneredcube for helping optimize this
body: ok so the modpack itself has plenty QoL mods as well as plenty of create mod and addons, the goal initially was to do lore and rp but i opted for optional, the New main goal is to get streamers to collab ie fellow pngtubers like myself, ive been working with another pngtuber to get this modpack optomized and have a bunch of unique things, another staple is the origins mod and its extension, can be tied into lore and rp but again lrp is optional
